title: United Edition
description: A build that adds features from Minecraft Bedrock
body:
Most likely, you've been thinking about how cool it would be if some of the chips from the bedrock edition were in the java edition and vice versa. So I've been thinking about this too, so I present you the Minecraft united edition mod build!

This build transfers most of the chips from the bedrock edition to Java, which allows you to use both java and bedrock functions. I tried to add most of the mods that add chips from the bedrock of the edition. Optimization, convenience, and small visual changes are all in my build.

I would be very grateful if you would support the build by downloading it or by liking it! Thanks!
